settings.heading: Returns & Refunds
settings.intro: Straightforward returns, because buying tech should feel low-risk.

settings.content:
Return window

You may request a return within [RETURN WINDOW — e.g. 30 days] of delivery. Items should be in their original condition and packaging, with all included accessories.

How to start a return

Contact us through the Contact page with your order number and the item you'd like to return. We'll provide return instructions and, where applicable, a return label.

Refunds

Once your return is received and inspected, we'll notify you and process your refund to the original payment method within [REFUND PROCESSING TIME — e.g. 5–10 business days]. Original shipping charges may be non-refundable.

Exchanges

Need a different model or variant? Let us know and we'll help arrange an exchange where stock allows.

Non-returnable items

[List any exceptions — e.g. opened software/digital products, items marked final sale, or hygiene-sensitive accessories.]

Damaged or defective items

If an item arrives damaged or defective, contact us right away. We'll make it right with a replacement, repair, or refund in line with the product's warranty.
